script:
So this happened about three months ago, and I still don’t know how to feel about it.

I live in a small apartment building — only six units, two floors. Pretty quiet. Mostly working people. I work from home, so I’m on my PC basically all day.

One night around 2:30 AM, my internet suddenly slowed to a crawl.

At first I thought it was my ISP. Happens sometimes. But when I logged into my router dashboard, I noticed something weird.
